---
id: domain.task
type: user-guide
status: draft
domain: domain
summary: Helps users accomplish one concrete Aobus task.
---
# Task title

## Outcome

State what the reader will accomplish.

## Prerequisites

List only prerequisites the reader must satisfy.

## Steps

Give an ordered, verifiable procedure.
When GTK, TUI, and CLI perform the same task differently, keep one task guide and branch only the affected steps instead of copying the contract into frontend-specific guides.

## Verify the result

Explain how the reader knows the task succeeded.

## Troubleshooting

Cover likely user-visible failure modes without exposing unnecessary internals.

## Related reference

Link exact commands, configuration, or format reference.
